loop1.title: Events KPI Strip
loop1.note: Showing total event counts and worst-panel deviations for the selected time bucket; per-panel aggregate values are derived from member meters.

loop1.title: Event Timeline at {period}
loop1.note: Showing per-member event counts and worst deviations from PRIMARY feeders; 2 members (UPS-05, UPS-06) have no data and are omitted from the roster.

loop1.title: Current Distribution at {period}
loop1.note: Showing current_avg per outgoing feeder; sag/swell/voltage/unbalance/deviation slots are honest-blanked as this meter class does not measure those quantities.

loop1.title: Other Panels Event at {period}
loop1.note: Showing per-panel event counts and metrics for the 10 listed members. Note: GIC-02-N6-UPS-05, GIC-02-N7-UPS-06, GIC-01-N9-Solar Incomer-1, GIC-02-N1-Solar Incomer-2, and GIC-15-N10-PCC-01 (Transformer-01) and GIC-15-N11-PCC-01 (Transformer-02) have no live data (has_data=N) and will render as blanks.
